# Security Intelligence Platform — Label System

## Type Labels
| Label | Color | Description |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `bug` | `#d73a4a` | Something isn't working |
| `enhancement` | `#a2eeef` | New feature or request |
| `documentation` | `#0075ca` | Improvements or additions to documentation |
| `refactor` | `#c5def5` | Code refactoring without behavior change |
| `performance` | `#fbca04` | Performance improvement |
| `security` | `#b60205` | Security-related change |
| `testing` | `#1d76db` | Test additions or improvements |

## Priority Labels
| Label | Color | Description |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `priority:critical` | `#e11d48` | Critical — must fix immediately |
| `priority:high` | `#f97316` | High — fix in current sprint |
| `priority:medium` | `#eab308` | Medium — fix in next sprint |
| `priority:low` | `#22c55e` | Low — fix when convenient |

## Status Labels
| Label | Color | Description |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `triage` | `#fef2f2` | Needs initial review |
| `in-progress` | `#dbeafe` | Currently being worked on |
| `blocked` | `#fef3c7` | Blocked by external dependency |
| `wontfix` | `#f3f4f6` | Will not be fixed |
| `duplicate` | `#f3f4f6` | Duplicate of another issue |
